# nerdctl_container_restart (Action)

Restarts a container with `nerdctl restart`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "nerdctl_container_restart" "app" {
  config {
    container = "app"
    timeout   = 5 # seconds before kill, 10 when unset
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container` (String) Container name or ID.

### Optional

- `signal` (String) Signal to send, e.g. `SIGINT`, passed with `-s`. Defaults to the container's stop signal.
- `timeout` (Number) Seconds to wait after the stop signal before killing the container, passed with `-t`. Defaults to 10.
